# LIFE DECO — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A business focused on interior furniture, offering products or services related to furnishing and designing interior living or commercial spaces. The brand likely caters to customers looking to enhance their home or office environments with quality furniture pieces.

## Pages

### Home
https://life-deco-c91ddacb.zappy5.app

https://life-deco-c91ddacb.zappy5.app/collections
Browse our curated furniture collections blending reclaimed wood interior design with timeless classics and sleek modern pieces. Find your statement piece and elevate every room now.

https://life-deco-c91ddacb.zappy5.app/design-services
Our expert design services bring consign &amp; design interiors to life with reclaimed wood accents and tailored layouts. Schedule your consultation and reimagine your space today.

Discover LIFE DECO&#39;s passion for consign &amp; design interiors and reclaimed wood craftsmanship. Learn how we blend classic and modern furniture to create spaces with soul and style.

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://life-deco-c91ddacb.zappy5.app/contact
- Endpoint: https://life-deco-c91ddacb.zappy5.app/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text)
  - `email` (email)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox)

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About LIFE DECO
A business focused on interior furniture, offering products or services related to furnishing and designing interior living or commercial spaces. The brand likely caters to customers looking to enhance their home or office environments with quality furniture pieces.

## Services/Products
- interior furniture

## Target Audience
- Luxury Homeowners
- Urban Apartment Dwellers
- Eco-conscious Buyers

## Industry
Interior Design & Furniture
